feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: 未本地化國家的公司幣別如何設定？
entry.content:
Hi Expert,
因導入公司所設籍公司並未本地化，故只能選擇德國，但公司幣別因無法更改會自動決定為歐元。

兩個問題：

1.要如何將公司改為開曼?

2.設定公司後要如何將公司改為USD?

entry.title: SME files upload in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We would like to know if there is a way to import SAE files exported from Concur to SAP Public Cloud. Is there any App/method that we could do this? Any help is appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: BMK – Return to Supplier - no outbound delivery created
entry.content:
Dear Community,

After a negative usage decision in QM, a returns purchase order with outbound delivery to the vendor is to be created. A Z-document type (ZNB) is used in the purchasing document. The shipping tab does not appear.

The warning message “No delivery type for returns processing assigned to item 00010” appears.

The procedure for system administration describes the steps from an on-premise / private cloud system. However, this customizing step is not provided in the public cloud.

An outbound delivery for purchase orders due for delivery cannot be created.

 

A Ticket has already been created. However, the suggested SAP-Note 2958447 does not solve the issue. All criteria of the solution in this note are met, but the shipping tab does not appear and the subsequent outbound delivery cannot be created.

 

Can you suggest on a solution?

 

Many thanks in advance and kind regards

Talke

entry.title: Bill of Material API for outbound services
entry.content:
Dear Community,

in our current public cloud project we use a 2-tier approach. In this regards, we would like to distribute bill of materials from public cloud to an OnPremise system using an ODATA API for outbound services.

I was already searching through the Business Accelerator Hub and the communication arrangement settings but I could not find a suitable API or outbound service.

Has anyone of you already had experience with the distribution of BOMs and can describe a solution?

 

Many thanks in advance and kind regards

Talke

entry.title: SAP PS PUBLIC Cloud not showing planned and actual costs in reports
Hey , Please can we delete a chart of account in SAP public cloud ?Thanks
#CoE#GDTD Failed to create CDS of type 399
entry.content:
For class ZTC_FEATURES with class type 399, I have added a feature starting with BD

Then use 'Generate CDS Views for Classification/Configuration' to change the CDS' YY1-ZTC-FEATURES01MARA '

But after I executed it, there were no newly added features starting with BD in the CDS' YY1-ZTC-FEATURES01MARA '

entry.title: Run Statutory Reports App custom billing document number tax amount showing -ve amounts in public cl
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud in a 3-system landscape.

In the "Run Statutory Reports" Fiori app, when exporting the report to Excel, I noticed that negative amounts are being displayed with a leading minus symbol (e.g., -100) instead of being shown in parentheses or another expected format.

Has anyone faced this issue before, and is there a configuration or workaround available to control how negative signs appear in the Excel export?

Thank you in advance for your support!

entry.title: Certificate C_S4CPB_2502
entry.content:
Hi Team,

in the latest update for the certificate C_S4CPB_2502 (SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA) it is necessary to go through the steps in the following learning journey, before certification: Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Now I have an issue on step 4: Practical Test - Showcase your skills by applying your acquired skills practically

The link to the system loads and the restricted system is displayed, but I am not able to execute any action there. After I receive the required task, the system is not responsive: learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/implementing-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/hands-on/practical-test-873

So I am stuck.  Can you please check the system on your end and suggest me how to proceed? I guess that this issue will prevent any user to get certified. 

Thanks for your support

entry.title: Re: #CoE#GDTD Failed to create CDS of type 399
entry.content:
Hi chenzc,

在为类生成cds配置后失败，所以在类新增的cds里都没有同步到cds试图中。

看报错是有关于特征sl_cd1的问题，可以先尝试修改或删除该特征值重新发布cds。

Best regards,

Angela

entry.title: GSTR1 report: In Run Statutory reports taxitems showing with symbol
entry.content:
Run Statutory Reports APP in GST R1 report tax its showing Credit balances. But in 'Manage customer line items' app its showing Output tax amount Debit balance in front of amount.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Invoice document - change/move of the positions
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I need to change the positions of some objects, for example sold-to party data, in the invoice document and create a customer specific solution. In the past it was possible to do this with the help of "Adobe Livecycle Designer". Unfortunately I found this tool just for SAP GUI use and I need a solution for SAP S/4HANA Fiori Public Cloud. 

Hopefully some of you know this problem and can help me to find a solution or give me some information where to download a version of the "Adobe Livecycle Designer" for SAP Fiori. It would be great if you have some other options to change/move fields in the invoice document.

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Rebilling of ordered items via customer project
entry.content:
Hi Guys

I need your help! Can someone explain how it is possible to recharge services or materials to a customer based on a supplier invoice that was assigned to a customer project?

I have assigned the purchase order—and thus the supplier invoice—to the relevant WBS element, and I can also see the costs reflected in the project reporting. However, I am unable to recharge these costs to the customer.

Thank you in advance!

Maik

entry.title: FIELD T012K-ESLIM
entry.content:
Hi Team, 


Hope you are doing great.


We need to access the field ESLIM of table T012K to create logic to generate user alerts warnings when the date is expired.


Could you please help me with that? Is there any provision for the view of this table to be released? 


Thank you, 


Regards,


cb USERNAME 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.content:
How to create workers with same email ID in manage workforce app?

entry.title: Challenge in Assigning admin role to business user in Public Cloud S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi,

I am facing challenge in assigning the admin role to business user in S/4HANA public cloud practical test in learning journey of (SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition). I am selecting mange business user tile but nothing is happening. could any one he

entry.title: Extension fields for workforce replication into S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Currently integrating Workforce master data into S/4HANA Public Cloud using SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) and SOAP APIs, and we need to use custom fields in our process. 

Therefore we have two queries: 

  1. Inbound (CPI → S/4): It seems custom fields are not available in this setup via SOAP APIs. Is there a way to enable or work around this?
  2. Outbound (S/4 → CPI): When you add custom fields to Workforce, events can’t be triggered or don’t include the custom fields in the payload. How can you send these fields to CPI — via events, CDS views, or another method?

Any guidance on how to implement custom fields in this scenario would be appreciated!

Best Regards. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Retention Amount in Sales Order Showing with VAT in Manage Customer Line item– Require Exclusion VAT
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We are using Payment Terms as a workaround to manage Retention Amounts in Sales Orders within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. However, we have observed a discrepancy in how the retention is displayed in the Manage Customer Line-Item app.

In the Manage Customer Line-Item app

  • The retention amount appears in a separate line, which is expected.

  • However, both the main amount and the retention amount include VAT, which results in a total VAT value that is not aligned with our requirement.

Business Requirement:

  • Retention amount should be displayed without VAT.
  • VAT should only be applied to the net payable amount, excluding the retention until it's due.

Request:

 

We would like to know:

  1. Is there a standard configuration or best practice in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to exclude VAT from the retention line?
  2. Can retention amount be excluded from VAT calculation or shown separately in reporting?

 

Regards,

Vishal

entry.title: What are the BADI's available for Payment Medium Format in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Can you let me know what BADIs are available for Payment Medium Format and their function

entry.title: Upload payroll file into MultiBank Connectivity Monitor
entry.content:
Our client needs to integrate a payroll payment file from an external system into SAP Multibank Connectivity system. Is this possible with MBC's current licensing?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
